items.title: Launcher uses localhost:5173 dev path
items.content: Stephanos launcher currently targets the Vite development UI at localhost:5173 during local development.

items.title: Backend runs on port 8787
items.content: Stephanos local backend API runs on port 8787.

items.title: Ollama runs on localhost:11434
items.content: Local Ollama is expected at localhost:11434 for Stephanos local-first AI routing.

items.title: gpt-oss:20b may need a 60000ms timeout
items.content: When routing requests to gpt-oss:20b through Ollama, Stephanos may need a longer timeout such as 60000ms.

items.title: User wants a desktop ignition switch
items.content: User wants a desktop ignition switch experience that opens Stephanos automatically.

items.title: User prefers local-first private operation
items.content: Stephanos should stay local-first and privacy-oriented whenever possible, avoiding unnecessary cloud dependencies.
